statement: In every magma, Equation 1605 (`x = (y * z) * (w * (x * z))`) implies Equation 1896 (`x = (y * (x * y)) * (x * z)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0382
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y z) (op w (op x z)))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op x y)) (op x z))
